title: SQL Injection Vulnerability
description: Due to the lack of information on input validation and sanitization, the system is potentially vulnerable to SQL injection attacks. Attackers could inject malicious SQL code into input fields to manipulate database queries, potentially leading to data breaches, data modification, or even complete system takeover.
attack_vector: Injection of malicious SQL code through user input fields (e.g., search boxes, login forms, data entry forms) that are not properly sanitized or validated.
mitigations: Implement parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ input validation and sanitization to filter out malicious characters and code.
Regularly update database software to patch known vulnerabilities.
